old_claim.note: Semiconductors is modeled as a necessary component or method for this technology in the current graph.

new_claim_absent: No dependency edge remains from atomic_layer_deposition to semiconductors; ALD is a vapor-deposition and nanofabrication technique with semiconductor applications among several application domains.

source_shape.source_locator: Abstract and Introduction, especially the description of ALD as a thin-film fabrication technique with applications in semiconductors, pan-semiconductors, environment, energy, and other fields.
source_shape.source_claim_summary: The review presents ALD as a self-limiting vapor-deposition technique for atomic-scale thin films, notes its 1970s atomic-layer-epitaxy history, and lists semiconductors as one application area among others.
source_shape.source_support_rationale: This rejects a semiconductor prerequisite because the source scopes ALD as a general thin-film/nanofabrication method whose use in semiconductors is an application, not a requirement for the technology itself.

ontology_before: The ALD node incorrectly treated semiconductors as a hard prerequisite, laundering a major application domain into the process definition.
ontology_after: ALD remains connected to CVD/thin-film and nanoscale manufacturing context while no longer requiring semiconductor materials as an upstream dependency.
invariant_preserved_or_changed: Changed: ALD is modeled as a broad deposition process with semiconductor applications rather than a semiconductor-dependent technology. Preserved: semiconductor process nodes can still depend on ALD where the narrower manufacturing claim requires it.
would_reject_if: The ALD node were narrowed to only semiconductor-fab ALD rather than the broader thin-film technique.
A source showed ALD cannot exist or be practiced without semiconductor materials or semiconductor device fabrication.
Removing the edge also removed ALD from downstream semiconductor process nodes where it is a valid process dependency.
short_reason: ALD is a broad atomic-scale thin-film deposition technique; semiconductors are an application domain, not a prerequisite.
